summary: Forked zo-hotline knowledge base (102 files) into vibe-pill-hotline. Added 10 new Vibe Pill-specific entries in 55-vibe-pill/ section covering program overview, pricing tiers, V's background, methodology, Meta-OS for founders, application criteria, member FAQ, value stack, world-first positioning line, and pedagogical framing. Updated knowledge index with all new entries. All entries written for voice delivery with Zøren's direct, rockstar tone.
broadcast: Vibe Pill KB ready at Knowledge/vibe-pill-hotline/ with 112 entries (102 base + 10 new). New entries in 55-vibe-pill/ section. Index updated. Pricing: Founding 15 $100/mo, Standard $300/mo, Zo-to-Zo $150/mo. Concierge identity is Zøren. Copied files retain original Zo platform content — only new entries are Vibe Pill branded. No Zoseph refs in new entries.
